reflection.candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat the directional call as UNPROVEN and refuse to size up — conviction without any historical analog match is untested pattern space.
reflection.mechanism: green_matches counts how many times the current live indicator configuration matched a historically profitable memory state. When it is 0, the conviction number is measuring internal agreement among indicators, NOT evidence that this specific configuration has ever paid off. AUDNZD showing conv=100% with green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0% is a crowded indicator config that has never been validated against realized outcomes — high agreement in untested space is how systems walk confidently into novel losing regimes.
reflection.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.60 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier *= 0.5  # freeze up-sizing until a historical analog confirms

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
